output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?institution ?institutionLabel ?city ?cityPopulation WHERE {
  ?institution p:P1689 ?membership .
  ?membership ps:P1689 wd:Q180312 .
  ?membership pq:P580 ?start .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) >= 1950 && YEAR(?start) <= 1959)
  .
  ?institution wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?cityPopulation .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?institution rdfs:label ?institutionLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?institutionLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?cityPopulation)
LIMIT 1

  ?membership ps:P1689 wd:Q180312.
  ?membership pq:P580 ?start.
  FILTER (YEAR(?start) >= 1950 && YEAR(?start) <= 1959).
  ?institution wdt:P131 ?city.
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?cityPopulation.
  OPTIONAL { ?institution rdfs:label ?institutionLabel . FILTER (lang(?institutionLabel) = 'en') }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?cityPopulation)
LIMIT 1
args.answer: There are no institutions that participated in the 2011 CIS football season with their inaugural season in the 1950s, as the Canadian Interuniversity Sport (CIS) organization was founded in 1961, making participation before 1961 impossible.
